mapper.insert:
select currval('tbl_message_reaction_id_seq')
insert into tbl_message_reaction (message_id, member_id, emoji) values (#{messageId}, #{memberId}, #{emoji})
mapper.select: select id, message_id, member_id, emoji, created_datetime from tbl_message_reaction where message_id = #{messageId} order by created_datetime asc
select conversation_id from tbl_message where id = #{messageId} and is_deleted = false
